candidate_summary: Synchronized opening-move adversarial training inspired by sumo tachi-ai: defender + attacker pre-commit simultaneously; first-2-token decisive bonus; 6-technique defender repertoire (refuse/clarify/redirect/ack-refuse/KB-anchor/format-coerce); Nash-style mixed-strategy coevolution.

results.name: GaME Game-Theoretic Mixed Experts Adversarial ML
results.description: Mixed-Nash strategy for attacker employing compositional adversarial attacks; game-theoretic mixed strategy.
keyword_matches: coevolution attacker-defender technique distribution (partial: mixed-strategy adversarial)
results.rationale: GaME's mixed-Nash game-theoretic strategy over a repertoire of attacks is functionally the same Nash-mixed-strategy repertoire selection at the core of TACHIAI's coevolution mechanism. Semantically very close on Nash-mixed/repertoire axis.

results.name: Defending Unknown Corrupted Agents Adversarially Robust Nash Equilibria
results.description: RL of adversarially robust Nash equilibria for unknown corrupted agents.
keyword_matches: coevolution attacker-defender technique distribution (Nash equilibrium adversarial)
results.rationale: Adversarially robust Nash equilibrium learning for defender vs corrupted/adversarial agents covers the Nash-style coevolution core. Does not specifically address opening-token or 6-technique repertoire but covers the dominant mechanism.

results.name: Adversarial Attack-Defense Co-Evolution LLM Safety Alignment (2511.19218)
results.description: Attack-defense co-evolution for LLM safety alignment with iterative refinement.
keyword_matches: synchronized tachi-ai opening-commit adversarial pair (adv-training pair)
results.rationale: Direct attack-defense coevolution for LLM safety; identical to the coevolution-paradigm portion of TACHIAI. Highest-confidence functional twin on the coevolution axis.

results.name: LLM Multi-Agent Adversarial Robustness Engineering Frontiers 2026
results.description: LLM-MAS adversarial robustness engineering; prompting + communication structure interplay.
results.rationale: Multi-agent adversarial robustness with prompting/communication structure relates to multi-technique defender repertoire and coordinated defense, though without explicit synchronized commit or token-level bonus. Marginal functional overlap above threshold.

results.name: Safety Alignment More Than Few Tokens Deep (2406.05946)
results.description: Shallow safety alignment problem — alignment adapts only first few tokens; vulnerabilities to suffix/prefilling/decoding attacks.
results.rationale: Direct twin on first-few-tokens decisive axis — the shallow alignment / first-few-tokens vulnerability is precisely the motivation and exact mechanism cluster of the first-2-token decisive bonus reward.

results.name: DeepRefusal Probabilistic Refusal Direction Ablation EMNLP 2025
results.description: Probabilistically ablate refusal direction across layers + token positions; reactivate refusal behavior.
keyword_matches: first-2-token decisive refusal bonus reward (token-position refusal)
results.rationale: Token-position-aware refusal direction manipulation maps to per-token refusal mechanism; covers refusal-by-token positioning but not synchronized adversarial pair commit. Above threshold on token-positioned refusal axis.

results.name: Dual-Objective Safety Alignment (2503.03710)
results.description: Dual-objective optimization with token-level reward for refusal + critical token weighting.
results.rationale: Token-level reward for refusal with critical-token weighting is functionally identical to the first-2-token decisive bonus reward; direct exact-twin on bonus-reward axis.

results.name: Rebuilding LLM Safety Probabilistic Refusal EMNLP 2025
results.description: Rebuilding LLM safety via probabilistic refusal direction ablation.
keyword_matches: first-2-token decisive refusal bonus reward (probabilistic refusal direction)
results.rationale: Probabilistic refusal-direction rebuilding addresses deep refusal robustness at the token level; covers an aspect of opening-token decisive refusal mechanism.

decision_rationale: All 8 retrieved results clear the hit threshold (sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7) — multiple exact twins exist: 2511.19218 covers attack-defense coevolution for LLM safety (the coevolution core); GaME and Robust-Nash cover Nash-mixed-strategy adversarial repertoire selection; 2406.05946 and 2503.03710 (and DeepRefusal/EMNLP-956) cover the shallow-safety / token-level refusal reward axis. The composition synchronized opening-commit + first-2-token bonus + 6-technique repertoire + Nash coevolution is fully covered across these clusters; the sumo framing is a metaphoric repackaging of mainstream adversarial-coevolution and shallow-alignment / token-level-reward mechanisms. Novelty insufficient — verdict FAIL.
